_comment: Pinned to HEAD of main as of 2026-04-28. The `ver` fields in the source Civitai workflow JSON are ComfyUI Registry internal versions, NOT GitHub tags — every `v1.0.4`-style ref I tried to pin to was missing on GitHub. Functional source of truth for the build is cog.yaml; keep these two in sync. Refresh via `git ls-remote <url> HEAD`.

nodes.name: ComfyUI-GGUF
nodes.purpose: Loading Z-Image and Qwen3 in GGUF format

nodes.name: was-node-suite-comfyui
nodes.purpose: Text Multiline, Text Concatenate, Masks Combine Regions. ltdrdata fork (per workflow aux_id), not WASasquatch.

nodes.name: rgthree-comfy
nodes.purpose: Power Lora Loader, Any Switch, Fast Groups Bypasser
